visuals.title: RGB Color Cube
visuals.description: Visual diagram for RGB Color Cube
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Color Models</text>
  
  <!-- RGB Model -->
  <rect x="50" y="60" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    RGB
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- CMYK Model -->
  <rect x="160" y="60" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    CMYK
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- HSL Model -->
  <rect x="270" y="60" width="100" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="320" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    HSL
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Connecting arrows -->
  <line x1="150" y1="80" x2="160" y2="80" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="260" y1="80" x2="270" y2="80" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <!-- Color examples -->
  <circle cx="100" cy="150" r="30" fill="#FF0000" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="100" y="195" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Red (255,0,0)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <circle cx="210" cy="150" r="30" fill="#00FF00" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="210" y="195" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Green (0,255,0)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <circle cx="320" cy="150" r="30" fill="#0000FF" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="320" y="195" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Blue (0,0,255)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Color wheel -->
  <circle cx="210" cy="280" r="50" fill="none" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="210" y="340" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Color Wheel
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
